creator: nate@root.org
text:
Date: Fri, 23 Aug 2002 10:44:39 +0100
From: Pete French <pete@twisted.org.uk>
To: nate@root.org
Subject: Re: kern/27834: Cannot warm-reboot Compaq AP400 due to SCSI
    problems

> Since you don't have anything on sym0, can you disable it?  I honestly
> don't know what is broken in interrupt sharing but I have seen lots of PRs
> involving it.

Interesting. I can see if the Compaq BIOS will let me disable it - though
I have a feeling it only lets me disable resource allocation, and that
prevents BSD booting at all (dont quote me on that, I just have a vague memory
of trying it when I first got the machine).

I can try it when I get backfrom Amsterdam next week and will let you know,

-pete.
